content: SAW normalization edge cases: division by zero occurs when all goals have identical value for a criterion (max - min = 0). Single-goal case: all criteria normalize to 0/0=NaN or 1 depending on implementation - must guard. Empty goals list: ranking function must return early with empty array. Float precision: 0.225+0.219+0.215+0.178+0.162=0.999 not 1.0 - validate with abs(sum-1.0)<0.001 tolerance not strict equality. Literature acknowledges zero values in decision matrix require special normalization handling.
